tooltip.oathboundrelics.branded_time_che: It measures how much of your life the Oath has consumed.
message.oathboundrelics.branded_time.rea: The burden is sufficient. The Sloth weapon may now be claimed.
message.oathboundrelics.branded_time.not: The burden is not yet enough.
Brands the bearer and awakens bound relics.
A covenant that clings to flesh, soul, and memory.
Binds permanently once equipped.
Allows the bearer to equip other Oathbound curios.
Seven curses await the Branded:
- Frailty: You take %s more incoming damage.
- Provocation: Neutral creatures within %s blocks turn hostile.
- Shattered Plate: Armor is %s less effective.
- Oppression: You deal %s less damage.
- Living Ember: Fire clings to you for at least %s while burning.
- Soul Fracture: On respawn, part of your soul was left behind. Retrieve it.
- Wakeful Doom: Sleep offers no refuge to the Branded.
Six blessings reward those who endure:
- Fortune of Blood: +%s Looting.
- Earthen Favor: +%s Fortune.
- Soul Harvest: +%s Experience from kills.
- Arcane Attunement: Enchanting options gain +%s levels.
- Bloodlust: +%s Attack Speed.
- Last Rite: When below %s HP, gain %s absorption.
Only those who bear the Relic may awaken Oathbound artifacts.
%s [Disabled by config]
Persists through death.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.requires_oathbou: Requires the Oathbound Relic to awaken.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.dormant_without_: Dormant unless the bearer is Branded.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.forbidden_text: Its meaning writhes beyond your grasp.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.ashen_nail.effec: While burning, your attacks deal 35% more damage.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.gravebell_locket: On kill, gain Speed I for 8s and Regeneration I for 4s.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.hunters_sigil.ef: Deal 25% more damage to enemies already targeting you.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.shroud_of_the_fo: When struck to 3 hearts or less, gain brief protection. 60s cooldown.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.hollow_eye.effec: See clearly in darkness and reveal nearby monsters.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.censer_of_ash.ef: Burning enemies take 20% more damage and are easier to track.
On kill, restore hunger and a small amount of health.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.thornbound_carap: Reflect 20% of incoming damage to attackers.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.executioners_coi: Deal 30% more damage to enemies below 30% health.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.relic_of_the_las: Survive a lethal hit once every 5 minutes.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.torch_of_graveso: Deal 25% more damage to undead and gain Strength on undead kills.
While carried, it drags at the body and deepens hunger.
The weapon remains dormant. You have not yet endured enough Branded Time.
You deserve some rest, after those days of suffering.
Only the Branded may wield its power.
It answers only to those who have endured nearly all their days beneath the Oath.
- If a hit does not kill, gain 1 Laziness stack for 1 minute
- Shift + Left Click: 10 block sweep for 75% damage, gain 3 Laziness stacks, weakens enemies for 10s
- Right Click: Throw a heavy cube for 75% damage and stun for 10s (30s cooldown)
tooltip.oathboundrelics.oathbound_reliqu: A vessel that insists there is always room for one more burden.
Passive: Wards the bearer with absorption and desperate renewal.
Intended: Grants +2 Charm slots while worn.
Drawback: Wearing too many oathbound relics stirs hunger.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.chain_of_the_pen: Pain remembers. The chain merely keeps count.
Passive: Damage taken is stored as Penance.
Your next melee strike consumes stored Penance for bonus damage.
Marked strikes briefly reveal their victim.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.eye_of_the_sleep: It never closes. It only waits for you to look back.
Passive: Grants night vision and reveals nearby hostiles through a ghostly glow.
Oakskin: While grounded and not sprinting, gain Resistance I.
The Eye grows strongest when the bearer stands their ground.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.censer_of_hollow: Its smoke smells like old vows and empty sanctuaries.
Passive: Nearby monsters are slowed and weakened.
The bearer gains renewal while surrounded.
In heavy crowds, the censer hardens the wearer further.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.nail_of_the_firs: It asks only one thing: finish what was started.
Passive: Repeated strikes build Martyr's Claim on one target.
At full stacks, the target becomes Judged.
Slaying the Judged grants haste and absorption.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.ashen_nail.flavo: It drinks flame like an old vow finally spoken aloud.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.ashen_nail.desc_: Passive: While burning, your attacks deal 35% more damage.
The Nail turns pain into heat and heat into force.
Its hunger grows brightest in fire.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.gravebell_locket: Each toll sounds like a burial you survived.
Passive: On kill, gain Speed I for 8s and Regeneration I for 4s.
Fresh death stirs the bell into motion.
It refuses to let the victor stand still.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.hunters_sigil.fl: It favors prey bold enough to bare its teeth.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.hunters_sigil.de: Passive: Deal 25% more damage to enemies already targeting you.
The Sigil rewards those who meet violence head-on.
A marked hunter does not fear being seen.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.pilgrims_thorn.f: A cruel little spur for long roads and longer penance.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.pilgrims_thorn.d: Passive: Gain 10% increased movement speed while Branded.
The Thorn urges the bearer onward without mercy.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.censer_of_ash.fl: Its cinders cling to the air like funeral incense.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.censer_of_ash.de: Passive: Burning enemies take 20% more damage.
Ash-smoke makes fleeing prey easier to follow.
The censer remembers where the fire last fed.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.executioners_coi: It lands the same way every time: on someone's ending.
Passive: Deal 30% more damage to enemies below 30% health.
The Coin favors wounded prey and certain kills.
Once judgment begins, it asks for follow-through.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.hollow_eye.flavo: An empty socket sees what living eyes were never meant to.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.hollow_eye.desc_: Passive: Blindness and Darkness struggle to cling to you.
It does not brighten the world. It strips away the lie.
A funerary stitch that tightens after every life cut short.
Passive: On kill, restore hunger and a small amount of health.
The Thread turns endings into sustenance.
Every corpse leaves something behind for it to gather.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.shroud_of_the_fo: It settles over the doomed like a second skin.
Passive: When struck to 3 hearts or less, gain brief protection.
The Shroud is never kinder than when death comes close.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.thornbound_carap: Its shell was made by something that survived too often.
Passive: Reflect 20% of incoming damage to attackers.
Striking the bearer means bleeding for it.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.torch_of_graveso: Its flame chants softly for the dead and loudly for the restless.
Passive: Deal 25% more damage to undead.
Undead kills grant a burst of Strength.
The song grows warmer near old bones.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.voidstep_band.fl: A ring for those who have already made peace with the drop.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.voidstep_band.de: The Band teaches the ground to forget you.
A failed step is still a step, if the void accepts it.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.vulture_charm.fl: It circles every battlefield long before the first body falls.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.vulture_charm.de: Passive: Gain 50% more experience from kills.
The Charm grows fat on endings.
It knows the worth of carrion better than gold.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.relic_of_the_las: It waits in silence for the one breath you were never meant to keep.
Passive: Survive a lethal hit once every 5 minutes.
The Relic refuses to surrender its bearer to death so easily.
What it preserves is not always left untouched.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.gold_ring.flavor: A modest band with just enough stubbornness to matter.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.gold_ring.desc_2: A simple ward against ordinary harm.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.gold_ring.desc_3: Plain, dependable, and harder than it looks.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.cyan_ring.flavor: Its pale glow settles over the skin like quiet frost.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.cyan_ring.desc_2: The ring hardens the bearer against cleaner, colder blows.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.cyan_ring.desc_3: A calmer strength, but stronger all the same.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.nebula_ring.flav: A dim star-field turns inside the metal when danger draws near.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.nebula_ring.desc: Passive: Adds +1 Ring slot while worn.
The Ring bends space just enough to make room for one more treasure.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.soul_gem: A torn fragment of a Branded soul.
message.oathboundrelics.vanitys_edge.loc: The blade rejects you. Your Branded time is still lacking.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.vanitys_edge.fla: Pride once lifted the cursed. Now it waits to devour them.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.vanitys_edge.req: Only the Branded may wield its power.
It answers only to those who have spent nearly all their days beneath the Oath.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.vanitys_edge.pas: - Above half health, gain +2 damage for every 2 HP above the midpoint
- If a hit does not kill, lose 1 HP
- Kills grant +0.1 Attack Speed for 3 minutes, stacking independently
tooltip.oathboundrelics.vanitys_edge.hel: - Nearby allies, companions, and pets lose 50% Attack Speed and Attack Damage
tooltip.oathboundrelics.vanitys_edge.inv: - For every 2 Armor, lose 1 Attack Damage
- Between 50% and 30% health, lose 50% Damage and Attack Speed
- Below 30% health, you fall into Losing Pride or Bravery for 10 minutes
tooltip.oathboundrelics.oblivion_stone.f: A dead stone that remembers what the world was trying to forget.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.oblivion_stone.l: - A rare crafting stone used in higher relic works
- Found only in the rarest forbidden caches
- Also drops from the Warden, Wither, and Ender Dragon
message.oathboundrelics.covetfang.locked: The blade covets more suffering before it will answer you.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.covetfang.flavor: It does not want power. It wants the power that belongs to someone else.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.covetfang.requir: Only the Branded may wield its hunger.
It answers only to those who have spent nearly all their days beneath the Oath.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.covetfang.passiv: - Gains bonus damage against targets stronger, healthier, faster, or more blessed than you
- Right-click a target to Claim it as your Coveted Target
- Slaying a Coveted Target steals pieces of its strength
- Failed kills wound you, and striking those beneath you wounds you further
tooltip.oathboundrelics.covetfang.invent: - Each beneficial effect on you reduces your Attack Damage
- Below 30% health, you become swift only if something stronger is near
tooltip.oathboundrelics.aredrite.flavor: A cold gem born where the world thins and the void stares back.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.aredrite.line_1: - A rare End-born gemstone used in higher relic works
tooltip.oathboundrelics.aredrite.line_2: - Hums faintly with distant, unfriendly power
tooltip.oathboundrelics.aredrite_armor.f: The End kept this metal buried for a reason.
- Strips Blindness and Darkness from the wearer
tooltip.oathboundrelics.aredrite_chestpl: - Grants warding when health runs low
- Endures when lesser armor would fold
tooltip.oathboundrelics.aredrite_legging: - Swifter still in the End and while Branded
tooltip.oathboundrelics.aredrite_boots.l: - Negates fall damage in the End
tooltip.oathboundrelics.tablet_of_stilln: The stone remembers a vow of weight, hunger, and surrender.
- A ritual tablet tied to the Sin of Sloth
- Used to awaken the blank form of Lethargic Flail
- It is never crafted, only discovered
tooltip.oathboundrelics.tablet_of_exalta: Its script reads like praise, but every line cuts like judgment.
- A ritual tablet tied to the Sin of Pride
- Used to awaken the blank form of Vanity's Edge
- It is never crafted, only discovered
tooltip.oathboundrelics.tablet_of_coveti: The glyphs shift when watched too long, as if they want what is yours.
- A ritual tablet tied to the Sin of Envy
- Used to awaken the blank form of Covetfang
- It is never crafted, only discovered
tooltip.oathboundrelics.burdened_flail_i: A ritual weight shaped in honor of collapse, hunger, and surrender.
- A forged idol required to awaken Sloth's weapon
- Worthless in battle, sacred in rite
- It remembers the shape of burden
tooltip.oathboundrelics.mirrorsteel_idol: Polished like triumph, heavy like expectation.
- A forged idol required to awaken Pride's weapon
- It reflects only the bearer it deems worthy
tooltip.oathboundrelics.hollow_fang_idol: Its edges seem to lean toward things that are not theirs.
- A forged idol required to awaken Envy's weapon
- It hungers for what others possess
tooltip.oathboundrelics.void_ashes.flavo: What remains when End-born power is burned past memory.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.void_ashes.line_: - Rare ash used in the highest Oathbound rites
- Can be gathered from slain Shulkers
